query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(750006, 'What does the Greek term "theopneustos" (θεόπνευστος) in 2 Timothy 3:16 mean?', 'multiple_choice', '["God-spoken","God-breathed","God-written","God-revealed"]', 'God-breathed', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(750006, 'What is "concursive inspiration"?', 'multiple_choice', '["God dictated every word","Human authors wrote without divine guidance","Divine and human authorship working together","Scripture was written by angels"]', 'Divine and human authorship working together', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750006, 'What does biblical inerrancy affirm?', 'multiple_choice', '["Scripture has no errors in the original manuscripts","Scripture has minor errors","Only spiritual matters are accurate","Translations are perfect"]', 'Scripture has no errors in the original manuscripts', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750006, 'What document provides a helpful articulation of biblical inerrancy from 1978?', 'multiple_choice', '["Westminster Confession","Chicago Statement on Biblical Inerrancy","Nicene Creed","Augsburg Confession"]', 'Chicago Statement on Biblical Inerrancy', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750006, 'According to 2 Peter 1:21, how were the human authors "carried along"?', 'multiple_choice', '["By their own will","By the Holy Spirit","By church tradition","By angelic messengers"]', 'By the Holy Spirit', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750006, 'What does the Reformation principle of sola Scriptura affirm about Scripture''s authority?', 'multiple_choice', '["Scripture is one authority among many","Scripture is the ultimate authority for faith and practice","Scripture needs church interpretation","Scripture is secondary to tradition"]', 'Scripture is the ultimate authority for faith and practice', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750006, 'According to John 10:35, what cannot be broken?', 'multiple_choice', '["Church tradition","Human reason","Scripture","The law of Moses"]', 'Scripture', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750006, 'How does a high view of Scripture shape our hermeneutical approach?', 'multiple_choice', '["We approach with skepticism","We approach with reverence expecting coherence","We ignore difficult passages","We rely only on feelings"]', 'We approach with reverence expecting coherence', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750006, 'What does Matthew 5:18 teach about God''s Word?', 'multiple_choice', '["It will eventually pass away","Not the smallest letter will pass away","It needs constant revision","It is merely human wisdom"]', 'Not the smallest letter will pass away', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750006, 'What is the relationship between Scripture''s authority and our interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["We judge Scripture","We submit to Scripture''s teaching","Authority depends on our agreement","Scripture has no authority"]', 'We submit to Scripture''s teaching', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750006, 'Explain how the doctrine of inspiration affects how we should approach biblical interpretation.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Student response required', 11, NOW(), NOW());
